mapper.select: select id, virtual_payment_no as virtualPaymentNo, pay_order_no as payOrderNo, channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, cashier_config_id as cashierConfigId, payment_method_id as paymentMethodId, payment_method_code as paymentMethodCode, title, amount, payer_name as payerName, status, paid_time as paidTime, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt from payment_virtual_channel_payment where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} order by created_at desc limit 1
